message:
feat(fleet): Improve deployment audit logging and preflight checks

- Enhance DeploymentAuditEntry with timestamps, deployment IDs, and machine info
- Add comprehensive AuditEventType variants for all deployment phases
- Add AuditSummary for deployment statistics
- Improve preflight checks with proper SSH client usage

Part of fleet worker deployment feature (bead remote_compilation_helper-brr)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
